purpose: A large hero banner at the top of a home page or launchpad. Communicates brand identity, primary welcome message, and optional call-to-action. Usually spans full width with a background image and prominent typography.
whenToUse: Landing page for a role-based SAP app
Fiori Launchpad home tile with welcome content
Marketing-style intro to a business flow
whenNotToUse: On task-focused screens — use a plain DynamicPageTitle
For a small header — use ShellBar's brand area
For product cards — use Card or GenericTile
Inside dialogs or popovers — too much visual weight
doRules: Keep title short (≤ 60 chars) and easy to scan
Include a clear call-to-action button when there is a primary next step
Use a background image that reinforces the brand or context
Ensure title contrast against background image (dark overlay if needed)
dontRules: Do not use hero banner on every page — reserve for landings
Do not put critical actions here alone — repeat them elsewhere
Do not omit the overlay if background image is busy — text won't read
Do not use for status messages or errors

layoutGuidance.placement: Top of home / landing page, below ShellBar
layoutGuidance.alignment: Title + subtitle + CTA left-aligned or centered

contentGuidance.contentRules: Title is welcome/orientation; subtitle offers context; CTA is verb-first
examples: Welcome, Nadia — your dashboard is ready
Get started with Purchase Orders — Create new PO ▸

responsiveBehavior.XL: Full hero with image + text + CTA
responsiveBehavior.S: Title + CTA only, image may hide or be simplified

requirements: Title contrast against background ≥ 4.5:1 (add overlay if needed)
Background image has alt='' (decorative) or descriptive alt
H1 semantic role for the title
CTA button clearly labeled with the destination action
